title: Hammercraft40k
description: This is a community mod of Warhammer 40k, firstly managed by The Commando 315, now by Ardilos and has the collaboration of other artists, the mod is a huge mod based on the grimdark universe of Warhammer 40k
body:
Requires Geckolib to Work!
Mod Description
Recently Opened a Github Repository
![Hammercraft logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf91e535be3bbedd595c8e140de0f0b0f4f2571b.png)

The Mod was originally created in order to carry out the failed attempt to create a decent Warhammer mod, the mod is a complex large community-created project that includes new creatures, npcs, weapons, armor and materials, to get you involved in this world of fantasy and roleplay.



The mod has a functional faction system that causes creatures from a specific faction to attack you and seek to kill you, or you can have creatures from different factions fight each other.



The mod is mainly inspired by the Warhammer franchise games (Boltgun, Darktide, Space Marine, Dawn of War), with technical elements of Minecraft



Factions
Neutral:

Neeutral is just a section to cover monsters, animals and items not related to a specific faction, it may include Necromunda monsters, Men of iron, Catachan creaures and other creatures.

Imperium

The most complete faction of the mod, has the most content in the mod, a lot of armors and guns, the Imperial Guard, Space Marines, Adepta Sodoritas, and Mechanicus are present in the Same faction

Chaos

The second most complete faction of the mod, has the most content in the mod, a lot creatures and enemies, adds new biomes to the nether, related to the CHAOS GODS, Traitor Space Marines and Cultists

Orkz

Has some enemies, the ork are da biggest and the strongest, a new Biome where live the Orkz, the mod adds the Squigs and gretchins, some craftable stuff and vehicles

Tau

some armors, and guns craftable, now tau warriors and kroots spawn around the map

Necron

some armors, and guns craftable, and some mobs spawns at deep dark, you can find some of their stuff at deepslate in crates

Eldar

Armor, weapons, crafting system, pretty developed but needs more work

Tyranids

iNCOMPLETE, has a bunch of enemies, but lacks in the gameplay, Tyranids still needs some modifications to beign playable
